gist.headline: The Daily Buzz
gist.blurb: Polly's been busy updating the community board with the latest news and apps.
gist.summary: Automated daily update to the README and social media pipeline files with the latest news and community apps.
gist.impact: Keeps the repository's front page fresh with the latest community creations and platform updates.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot updating a community bulletin board with fresh news clippings.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-headed robot pinning up small pixelated news clippings on a wooden bulletin board. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
